en.title: Scripture Map
en.description: Interactive 2D grid of biblical books organized by testament and section, with clickable chapter selection, color-coded reading history heatmaps, multi-user presence indicators, zoom controls, and timeline-based filtering.
en.options-description: Control the view of the content on the map
